name: ethernetPacket::GetVlanId
title: ethernetPacket::GetVlanId
description: Returns the VLAN ID, if the Ethernet packet contains a VLAN tag.For double-tagged VLAN form 2 can be used to access a specific VLAN ID.

parameters.name: vlanIndex
parameters.description: Index of the VLAN tag for double-tagged VLANs. Index 0 is the inner VLAN, index 1 the outer VLAN.Range: 0..2

return: ID of the VLAN or 0xFFFF if no VLAN is available.
